query:
SELECT 
  ub.id,
  u.name AS usuario,
  u.email,
  b.name AS conquista,
  b.description AS descricao,
  ub.awardedAt
FROM user_badges ub
JOIN users u ON u.id = ub.userId
JOIN badges b ON b.id = ub.badgeId
ORDER BY ub.awardedAt DESC;
